items.title: Dow Jones Tumbles As Trump's Greenland Threats Spur Sell The U.S. Trade; Tesla, Nvidia Skid
items.description: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq broke key support on Trump's Greenland push with his Davos speech on tap. Nvidia, Tesla and other megacaps slumped. Netflix fell late.

items.title: Stocks slide after Trump threatens European allies with tariffs
items.description: U.S. stocks sank on Tuesday following President Trump's weekend threats to impose tariffs on some NATO trading partners.

items.title: Why Amazon (AMZN) Dipped More Than Broader Market Today
items.description: The latest trading day saw Amazon (AMZN) settling at $231, representing a -3.4% change from its previous close.

items.title: Amazon CEO: Prices have gone up from tariffs
items.description: If your next Amazon order seems more expensive, President Donald Trump’s sweeping tariffs may be partially to blame, Amazon CEO Andy Jassy said Tuesday.

items.title: 3 Growth Stocks Wall Street Might Be Sleeping On, but I'm Not
items.description: The crowd is underpricing all three of these names, ignoring their likely futures.
